name: CROSS_TOP_PATHWAYS_BY_CANCER
cypher:
MATCH (c:Cancer {name:$cancer})<-[:DIFFERENTIAL_AND_HIGHLY_EXPRESSED_IN]-(t:Target)-[:IN_PATHWAY]->(pw:Pathway)<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
RETURN pw.name AS pathway, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, pathway
LIMIT 10;
